title: Tag.tag_type is stringly-typed
description:
src/content.rs:18-24 — Tag.tag_type is String, but only ever holds 'Hashtag' or 'Mention'. This is primitive obsession / stringly-typed design.

Impact: Nothing prevents constructing a Tag with tag_type='Foo'. A TagKind enum {Hashtag, Mention} with a custom Serialize impl (or serde rename) would make invalid states unrepresentable and eliminate the repeated 'Hashtag'.to_string() / 'Mention'.to_string() allocations throughout content.rs.

The struct also lacks Debug and Clone on the right items (it has both, good), but is missing PartialEq/Eq which would make testing easier and is natural for a value type.
close_reason: Tag.tag_type replaced with TagType enum (Hashtag, Mention)
